verdict.headline: Safe to transact — sanctions checks are clean and the wallet has a long-standing, high-balance on-chain footprint consistent with a major known entity (Binance cold wallet).
verdict.reasoning: Both the Chainalysis on-chain oracle and the x402 sanctions service returned clean (not sanctioned). The wallet holds ~656,224 ETH, a balance consistent with a major institutional/exchange wallet (widely known as a Binance cold wallet), which is strong positive supporting evidence. Labels and ENS returned no explicit match, and web sentiment surfaced no negative reports. With two independent sanctions-clean sources plus very substantial verified on-chain activity, confidence is high.

findings.finding: Clean on both Chainalysis on-chain oracle (isSanctioned: false) and x402 sanctions service (no matches, risk_level: low).
No explicit label returned by Address Labeler; entity_type unknown. (Address is widely known off-platform as a Binance cold wallet.)
Very large balance (~656,224 ETH), consistent with a major institutional/exchange wallet — strong positive supporting evidence.
No negative reputation hits (no scam, hack, exploit, or lawsuit references surfaced).
No ENS reverse record; neutral signal.

services.rationale: Only candidate with 0% failure rate AND inputInfoCompleteness of 2/3, while also having the lowest price — all stronger signals than the untested alternatives.
Only labels candidate with a confirmed 0% failure rate, which is the strongest signal; description clearly matches label-classification intent (exchange, mixer, contract, known entity).
Only onchain_history candidate with both a confirmed 0% failure rate and inputInfoCompleteness of 2/3, giving it a decisive advantage over all untested alternatives.

Resource index 2 has a confirmed 0% failure rate like index 0, but its description ('Risk score 0-100 for any wallet address') more directly maps to a sentiment/reputation signal; index 1 is disqualified by 100% failure rate.
